summary: P2 Features Testing Complete. Tested: Dashboard Reports (advanced analytics with recharts), Season Passes CRUD, Season Pass verification API, CSV Export, PDF Export button, Success page print button, 404 page, Scanner wake lock. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features working.

issues: When navigating to a non-existent venue slug (e.g., /nonexistent-page), the VenueLanding component shows 'Loading...' indefinitely instead of redirecting to 404 page. The NotFound route only catches truly unknown routes like /multi/segment/path, but /:slug catches all single-segment paths.

action_items: Consider adding 404 handling in VenueLanding.jsx when API returns 404 for venue not found
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard Reports page has comprehensive analytics: revenue trend with 7-day moving average, channel split pie chart, ticket breakdown bars, day/hour heatmaps, geographic map with country data
Season Passes CRUD fully functional with create/update/delete/list operations
Season Pass verification endpoint works correctly - returns INVALID for unknown tokens
PDF export uses html2canvas+jsPDF, CSV export uses backend endpoint
Scanner page correctly implements wake lock API to prevent screen timeout
Success page has 'Stampa biglietto' button with print icon calling window.print()
Route mismatch: sidebar link to '/dashboard/report' (singular) but original test used '/dashboard/reports' (plural) - now corrected

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all P2 features working, minor 404 UX issue

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed season passes created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully tested: 1) Dashboard Reports at /dashboard/report (singular) shows all charts: revenue trend with moving average, channel split donut, ticket performance bars, day/week heatmaps, geographic visitor map; 2) Season Passes at /dashboard/passes has full CRUD with tabs for Abbonamenti/Abbonati; 3) Season pass verification at POST /api/scan/verify-pass; 4) Success page at /{slug}/success has print button with window.print(); 5) Scanner has wake lock implementation; 6) PDF export via html2canvas+jsPDF, CSV via /api/dashboard/reports/export

features_tested.dashboard_reports_charts: PASS - 4 recharts components rendered: ComposedChart with revenue trend, PieChart for channels, BarChart for days, AreaChart for hours
features_tested.dashboard_reports_kpis: PASS - KPI cards show revenue, tickets, orders, donations with % change vs previous period
features_tested.dashboard_reports_pdf_button: PASS - PDF Report button visible and functional
features_tested.dashboard_reports_csv_button: PASS - CSV button visible, backend endpoint tested
features_tested.season_passes_ui: PASS - Page loads with tabs, form modal opens with all fields
features_tested.season_pass_verification: PASS - POST /api/scan/verify-pass returns correct result for invalid tokens
features_tested.success_page_print_button: PASS - 'Stampa biglietto' button with data-testid found
features_tested.scanner_wake_lock: PASS - Code review confirms navigator.wakeLock.request('screen') implementation
features_tested.404_page: PARTIAL - NotFound component exists but VenueLanding catches single-segment paths first
